cells.rationale: Guarding the fold-side timestamp conversion touches the sacred never-throw and re-fold-determinism invariants where a plausible-but-wrong fallback (wall-clock, locale, or altered valid-boundary format) silently propagates through every replay — a nameable subtle-correctness invariant that clears opus's burden, at the contract-shaped xhigh band despite the small surface.
